title: Expert-reviewed bank for a regulated subject (health/safety facts)
context: Items whose subject matter is health, legal, safety, or financial fact — even when framed educationally — are escalated to riskTier:high and require a credentialed expert sign-off and an explicit 'educational, not advice' framing. This bank is intentionally held in the backlog until a credentialed expert reviewer is secured for the specific subject area and a realistic adoption path confirmed. Without both, this task must not be started. The output is framed as educational content, not professional advice.
objective: Author an expert-reviewed question bank on a regulated subject (health or safety facts) with a credentialed expert sign-off, 'educational, not advice' framing, and all standard gates passed.
acceptanceCriteria: A credentialed expert reviewer secured and named for the specific regulated subject area before any authoring begins.
Source passed gate-003 (permits derivatives; no PII) with gate artifact committed.
Every item prominently framed as educational content with a visible 'educational, not advice' statement.
Coverage >= 90% of stated learning objectives; machine gate green.
Human sign-offs recorded: credentialed expert (factual accuracy + 'not advice' framing), SME, license, accessibility, bias.
Bank adopted by a beneficiary with adoption evidence artifact committed.
output: A complete, credentialed-expert-reviewed question bank on a regulated subject, with 'educational, not advice' framing, all gates passed, and adoption evidence committed.
